Combined RFT Electrolytes LFT
Test Name Result Unit Reference Range
Hemoglobin Result 9.1 Unit g/dL Reference Range 13-17
HGB Result 9.1 Unit g/dL Reference Range 13-17
Creatinine Result 1.9 Unit mg/dL Reference Range 0.6-1.2
Na Result 132 Unit mmol/L Reference Range 135-145
K Result 5.4 Unit mmol/L Reference Range 3.5-5.0
Total bilirubin Result 2.1 Unit mg/dL Reference Range 0.2-1.2
SGOT Result 75 Unit U/L Reference Range 0-40
SGPT Result 82 Unit U/L Reference Range 0-40
CRP Result 96 Unit mg/L Reference Range 0-5
